title: L3 cycle.phase Payload
description: Emitted once per phase invocation (reader|decider|dispatcher|awaiter|logger). Captures outcome + duration + diagnostic; replayable. cycle-098 Sprint 3A.

phase_index.description: 0=reader, 1=decider, 2=dispatcher, 3=awaiter, 4=logger. Permits ordered replay independent of clock skew.

exit_code.description: Phase script exit code (null on timeout if no exit observed).

diagnostic.description: Stderr tail (last ~4KB) on error/timeout; null on success. Redacted via _SECRET_PATTERNS before write.

output_hash.description: SHA-256 of phase stdout when captured, for replay determinism. null if stdout discarded.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-phase timeout budget that was applied (allotted, not consumed).
